message:
Generalize fan-out: compute pool pattern, worktree materialization

Network-as-compute architecture: each DO is a compute unit with ~128MB
memory, but by dispatching work to a pool of workers via RPC, capacity
scales with pool size instead of single-DO limits.

- Extract dispatchToPool/batchForPool into compute-pool.ts (reusable
  scatter/gather pattern with fail-fast semantics)
- Evolve PackWorkerDO into multi-action worker (build-segment + write-worktree)
- Add checkout fan-out: for >200 files, dispatch blob reads + R2 writes
  to compute pool — workers read from R2 chunks and write to worktree
  paths independently, coordinator sends only metadata
- Refactor packfile-builder to use shared pool dispatch
- Add worktree fan-out test (90 tests, 31 conformance)
